betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6CMB Steel & Nitanium§f

§aEnd-game alloys for the DFC, Spark Capacitor, and elite radiation shielding!§f

§6CMB Steel (Combine Steel)§f:
• Late-game superalloy made from Magnetized Tungsten + Poisonous Mud
§bProduction§f: Crucible — 6 Magnetized Tungsten Nuggets + 3 Poisonous Mud Nuggets → 1 Ingot
§bAlternate§f: Smelt CMB scrap from defeated Hunter Choppers

§bKey Uses§f:
  • CMB-Schrabidate Antimatter Laser Crystal§f — enables UV range for FEL
  • Spark Capacitor§f — ultimate energy storage
  • Contained Counter-Resonant Singularity§f — DFC fuel injector core
  • Hunter Chopper§f — autonomous combat drone
  • DFC Fuel Injector§f
  • High-end Armor & Tools§f
  • Construction Blocks§f — CMB Steel Tile (3,000 blast resist) and Reinforced CMB Bricks (§e30,000§f blast resist!)
  • Music Disc: Vortal Combat§f

§6Nitanium§f:
• Purple powdery blend with no refined form, requires cyclotron-produced elements
§bProduction§f: Crafting table — Neptunium + Iodine + Thorium + Astatine + Neodymium + Caesium powders → §e6 Nitanium Blend§f
§bAlternate§f: Centrifuge/electrolyze trixite crystals; asteroid mining ship

§bKey Uses§f:
  • Elite Radiation Absorber§f — Saturnite + Nitanium + Advanced Radiation Absorber
  • NITAN 100 Octane Super Fuel§f — main component

§eTip§f: CMB Steel requires §bpoisonous mud§f from the Watz Power Plant, so you can't skip the Watz! Nitanium is optional until you need elite radiation protection.
